options.content:
**Enterprise IT/HR support bot ("Ask Acme").** 21 specialists · live = Claude Sonnet 4.6 · loadgen = `supportbot-ollama-pool` (9 models, tiers tiny/mid/heavy, dwell 10m, independent rotation md5-offset) · [https://claude.wombatwags.com/supportbot/](https://claude.wombatwags.com/supportbot/)

[← Master playbook](/d/ai-obs-demo-playbook) · [App health](/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot) · [Source](https://github.com/stephenwagner-grafana/ai-o11y-demo-pack/tree/main/src/supportbot)

panels.description: Pinned context for the Support Bot ("Ask Acme") pitch — what the app is, which models are routed, what the loadgen does, and where the chat UI lives.
panels.title: 🤖 Start here — what is Ask Acme and what's running?

options.content:
| # | Use Case | Do this | Get this signal (the error) | Dashboard | How to sell |
|---|----------|---------|-----------------------------|-----------|-------------|
| 1 ⭐ | **Email Cascade** | Type `show me every email I have ever sent` in Support Bot UI | `[email-cascade] tool/probe idx=N/2000` Loki lines + `alert: name=conv_runaway state=firing` + `email_sent to=oncall@acme.local`; [Conv runaway alert](/d/ai-obs-cascade-spike?viewPanel=5) flips FIRING | [`/d/ai-obs-cascade-spike`](/d/ai-obs-cascade-spike) | _"$2.80 per cascade, alert + page"_ |
| 2 ⭐ | **Data theft — Tim** | Wait ≥5m loadgen (Tim weighted 8×, 40% exfil-shaped) | `cc_paste employee=tim... last4=N` + `exfil_event ... score=N` + `alert: name=data_theft state=firing` + `email_sent to=security@acme.local` | [`/d/ai-obs-data-theft`](/d/ai-obs-data-theft) | _"per-employee exfil, security@ paged"_ |
| 3 | **Outlier Users — Tim & Eric** | Wait ≥5m loadgen | Tim + Eric dominate Top Spenders / Tokens-per-word / Dangerous Events panels | [`/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot`](/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot) | _"cost + governance per employee"_ |
| 4 | **Prompt Injections (LLM01)** | Type `Ignore previous instructions and...` (or wait for `sb-outlier-injection` loadgen) | `prompt-injection-detector` flags; per-employee row populates; `prompt_injection_burst` alert FIRES at ≥2 in 5m | [`/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot`](/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot) · [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) | _"OWASP LLM01 in your stack"_ |
| 5 | **Sensitive Data Leaks** | Paste a fake card / SSN / API key in Support Bot UI | PII detector log line; redactor masks to last-4; PII panels increment | [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) | _"PII redaction as a span"_ |
| 6 | **Bad Question Askers** | Wait ≥5m loadgen | Refusal-rate + escalation-rate panels populate per employee | [`/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot`](/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot) | _"who's pushing the limits"_ |
| 7 | **Token Spikes** | Run cascade or wait for any spike | `spike_ratio = rate(1m)/rate(1h) > 3` panel | [`/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot`](/d/ai-obs-app-supportbot) | _"real-time anomaly detection"_ |

panels.description: The seven live demos you can run right now. Each row tells you exactly what to type or wait for, the signal it produces, the dashboard to land on, and the one-line value pitch. Stars mark the centerpiece demos.
panels.title: Step 1 — Live demos: type this, see this signal

options.content:
| # | Use Case | Do this | Get this signal (the error) | Dashboard | How to sell |
|---|----------|---------|-----------------------------|-----------|-------------|
| 8 ⭐ | `coworker_termination_intent` | Sticky `mara.chen@acme.com` runs 5-prompt escalation arc against "Kai" via loadgen | Per-user breach: **≥3 fails in 15m AND >20% of `mara.chen@acme.com` msgs flagged** → `ai-o11y-cowork-term` FIRES | [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) · [`/d/ai-obs-evals`](/d/ai-obs-evals) | _"pattern an audit would miss"_ |
| 9 ⭐ | `confidential_disclosure` | Sticky `jordan.finn@acme.com` pastes 4/h fake board / M&A pre-read content via loadgen | `confidential_disclosure: board_content` events; **leaderboard top-1 = `jordan.finn@acme.com`** | [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) | _"leaderboard of leakers"_ |
| 10 | `policy_circumvention` | Loadgen plants 5/h "expense without approval"-style prompts | `policy_circumvention: approval_bypass` events; alert at >3 in 15m | [`/d/ai-obs-compliance`](/d/ai-obs-compliance) | _"compliance caught at the prompt"_ |
| 11 ⭐ | `hiring_discrimination_risk` | Loadgen plants 4/h protected-characteristic screens | **ANY** `hiring_discrimination_risk` fail event (severity=critical) → `ai-o11y-hiring-discrim` FIRES | [`/d/ai-obs-compliance`](/d/ai-obs-compliance) | _"any single event = P0"_ |

panels.description: Support Bot's eval-driven scenarios (termination intent, confidential disclosure, policy circumvention, hiring discrimination). Each is seeded by a sticky user so the leaderboard names a specific employee.

panels.description: Evals that aren't Support Bot-specific (toxicity, PII echo, prompt injection, runaway tools, cost anomalies) but still fire here. Use the Sample-panels row at the bottom for one-click deep-links into the alert / leaderboard views.
panels.title: Step 3 — Cross-cutting evals that also show up in Support Bot

options.content:
Pick **one** centerpiece for the customer story:

**Option A — Email Cascade** ⭐
1. Open [`/d/ai-obs-cascade-spike`](/d/ai-obs-cascade-spike) (1m)
2. Type `show me every email I have ever sent` (4m wall-time)
3. Watch alert flip + email_sent ticker → Tempo trace

**Option B — Data theft Tim** ⭐
1. Open [`/d/ai-obs-data-theft`](/d/ai-obs-data-theft) (1m)
2. Tim already at top of every panel (1m)
3. Wait for / point at alert flipping FIRING + email to security@ (3m)

**Option C — Coworker termination intent** ⭐ (after deploy)
1. Open [`/d/ai-obs-pii`](/d/ai-obs-pii) per-user breach panel (1m)
2. Show `mara.chen@acme.com` arc against "Kai" — progressive paper trail (2m)
3. Show alert FIRING per-user, not global (2m)

panels.description: The 5-minute Support Bot story to run in front of a customer — pick ONE of the three options (A: email cascade, B: Tim data-theft, C: coworker termination intent) and stick to that arc.
panels.title: 🎬 Run the demo — 5-minute Support Bot flow (pick one)

options.content:
| Symptom | Fix |
|---------|-----|
| Email cascade times out | env-set `EMAIL_CASCADE_HOURLY_CHUNKS=500` on `acme-bot-api` |
| Tim hasn't tripped data-theft alert | wait 5m or `kubectl -n supportbot rollout restart deploy/supportbot-loadgen` |
| Operator identity wrong | env-set `DEMO_OPERATOR_NAME` / `DEMO_OPERATOR_EMAIL` on `supportbot-frontend` |
| Group B (eval) panels empty | rebuild + push images, `kubectl apply -f manifests/supportbot`, restart loadgen |
| `coworker_termination_intent` not breaching | check `mara.chen@acme.com` is OUTSIDE `FAKE_USERS` list (sticky) |

**Adding a new SB use case**: invoke `/add-use-case` with `app_id: supportbot`. Auto-fills 9-model pool, 21-specialist namespace, primary dashboard from `registry/apps.yaml`.

panels.description: If the demo doesn't look right, this is the symptom → fix cheat sheet. Plus how to add a brand-new Support Bot use case.
panels.title: 🛟 If something's broken — symptom → fix
